name_en: 👑Original, Model: M46740 Monogram Mini Twisted. The Monogram canvas Saumur BB handbag reinterprets a beloved archival design in a modern style. The saddle bag shape and natural cowhide strap buckle evoke a equestrian spirit, but the front buckle hides a magnetic closure: convenient and modern. This small bag has space to store a day's essentials and is versatile due to the detachable shoulder strap and handle. Size: 20x15x7.5cm
